evals.prompt: Generate the a9s UX/UI resource spec for shortName `ec2`. Save to docs/resources/ec2.md.
evals.expected_output: Uniform spec with all seven sections, S1-S5 surfaces mapped, AWS-sourced cause text (StateReason.Message / StateTransitionReason), and no internal jargon in S4/S5.
evals.tests: Dense happy path: many related targets, rich Wave 1, Wave 2 via DescribeInstanceStatus, non-empty Wave 3.

evals.prompt: Generate the a9s UX/UI resource spec for shortName `dbi`. Save to docs/resources/dbi.md.
evals.expected_output: Correctly models the canonical `~` case: `available` + maintenance scheduled = green row + `~` glyph, NOT counted in issues:N.
evals.tests: Healthy-with-background-concern path. Tests that `~` does not bump S1.

evals.prompt: Generate the a9s UX/UI resource spec for shortName `s3`. Save to docs/resources/s3.md.
evals.expected_output: Correctly applies 'No Wave 1 signals' clause and blank-healthy-Status rule. Wave 2 per-bucket via GetPublicAccessBlock.
evals.tests: Wave 1 is None; tests the silence-is-UX rule at scale.
